LEGAL COUNSEL and GLADATORIAN are packed with class and there is a big weight spread. Take your pick, many can get into the money!

Capital O/letter I occasionally appeared inside numeric fields. Obvious monetary O->0 repairs were applied; ambiguous fields are retained as OCR text.
Past-performance rows are retained as raw OCR rows where detailed fixed-width columns could not be split safely.
warnings: Global best-bets/permutation table was not safely extracted from OCR layout; per-race betting leg raw text is retained under each race where readable.
Horse profile enrichment is conservative; table summary values should be treated as primary for runner number, name, weight, draw, trainer, jockey, HMR/CMR, comments, and forecast price.
